segments.text: Thus the Lord God showed me:
Behold, He formed locust swarms at the beginning of the late crop; indeed it was the late crop after the king's mowings.
segments.speaker: The Lord God

segments.text: And so it was, when they had finished eating the grass of the land, that I said:
O Lord God, forgive, I pray! Oh, that Jacob may stand, For he is small!
segments.speaker: Amos

segments.text: So the Lord relented concerning this.
It shall not be.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Thus the Lord God showed me:
Behold, the Lord God called for conflict by fire, and it consumed the great deep and devoured the territory.
segments.speaker: The Lord God

segments.text: Then I said:
O Lord God, cease, I pray! Oh, that Jacob may stand, For he is small!
segments.speaker: Amos

segments.text: So the Lord relented concerning this.
This also shall not be.
segments.speaker: The Lord God

segments.text: Thus He showed me:
Behold, the Lord stood on a wall made with a plumb line, with a plumb line in His hand.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: And the Lord said to me,
Amos, what do you see?
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: A plumb line.
segments.speaker: Amos

segments.text: Behold, I am setting a plumb line In the midst of My people Israel; I will not pass by them anymore.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: The high places of Isaac shall be desolate, And the sanctuaries of Israel shall be laid waste. I will rise with the sword against the house of Jeroboam.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Then Amaziah the priest of Bethel sent to Jeroboam king of Israel, saying,
Amos has conspired against you in the midst of the house of Israel. The land is not able to bear all his words.
segments.speaker: Amaziah

segments.text: Jeroboam shall die by the sword, And Israel shall surely be led away captive From their own land.
segments.speaker: Amaziah

segments.text: Then Amaziah said to Amos:
Go, you seer! Flee to the land of Judah. There eat bread, And there prophesy.
segments.speaker: Amaziah

segments.text: But never again prophesy at Bethel, For it is the king's sanctuary, And it is the royal residence.
segments.speaker: Amaziah

segments.text: Then Amos answered, and said to Amaziah:
I was no prophet, Nor was I a son of a prophet, But I was a sheepbreeder And a tender of sycamore fruit.
segments.speaker: Amos

segments.text: Then the Lord took me as I followed the flock, And the Lord said to me,
Go, prophesy to My people Israel.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Now therefore, hear the word of the Lord:
Do not prophesy against Israel, And do not spout against the house of Isaac.
segments.speaker: Amaziah

segments.text: Your wife shall be a harlot in the city; Your sons and daughters shall fall by the sword; Your land shall be divided by survey line; You shall die in a defiled land; And Israel shall surely be led away captive From his own land.
segments.speaker: The Lord
